notes: Reads supported local session JSONL files under ~/.codex/sessions.
Reads ~/.codex/history.jsonl when present.

redaction_notes: Search output is local/private; review before sharing.

notes: Reads Pi session JSONL files under ~/.pi/agent/sessions, including per-cwd session directories produced by current Pi releases.
An explicit Pi session JSONL file path remains supported with ctx import --provider pi --path.
Also reads ~/.omp/agent/sessions from Oh My Pi (OMP), a Pi fork, using the identical pi_session_jsonl format.

redaction_notes: Fixtures are synthetic; real local output remains private by default.

notes: Reads Claude Code project JSONL transcripts under ~/.claude/projects, including nested subagent transcripts when present.
Reads OpenCode SQLite history from ~/.local/share/opencode/opencode.db using a read-only connection.
Reads Kilo Code SQLite history using the OpenCode-family SQLite normalizer against a read-only connection.
KILO_DB overrides the database path; relative KILO_DB values resolve under the Kilo XDG data directory.
When KILO_DB is not set, ctx discovers the default Kilo DB plus channel DBs named kilo-<channel>.db.

redaction_notes: Reads the provider SQLite database read-only; imported text, cwd, model, token/cost metadata, local source paths, and searchable previews remain in the local ctx index.
KILO_CONFIG_DIR controls Kilo config, not the SQLite history database path.
blockers: Only OpenCode-derived SQLite session/session_message and legacy message-table projections are imported; todo and permission tables are recognized as schema neighbors but not converted into separate ctx events.

notes: Reads Kiro CLI SQLite history from data.sqlite3 using a read-only connection.
The official 2.10.0 Linux binary created $XDG_DATA_HOME/kiro-cli/data.sqlite3 with conversations_v2(key, conversation_id, value, created_at, updated_at) and conversations(key, value).
Conversation payload parsing covers value.history[] entries with user Prompt text, assistant Response text, and assistant ToolUse content/tool_uses.

redaction_notes: Reads the provider SQLite database read-only; imported prompts, assistant text, tool-use arguments, cwd/directory keys, local source paths, and searchable previews remain in the local ctx index.
KIRO_HOME is documented for Kiro-managed session/settings homes, but this importer does not infer a SQLite DB path from KIRO_HOME.
blockers: Does not import the newer ~/.kiro/sessions/cli JSON/JSONL event-log format observed in recent Kiro CLI reports.
Windows Kiro CLI SQLite path was not proven for this pass.

notes: Reads Crush SQLite history from crush.db using a read-only connection.
Discovery checks CRUSH_GLOBAL_DATA, XDG data homes, configured data_directory values from crush.json, and project .crush directories.

redaction_notes: Reads the provider SQLite database read-only; imported message text, tool output previews, command output, file paths, model, token/cost metadata, and local source paths remain in the local ctx index.
blockers: Full GA needs continued validation against Crush SQLite schema drift.

notes: Reads Goose sessions SQLite history from sessions/sessions.db using a read-only connection.
Discovery checks GOOSE_PATH_ROOT, XDG data homes, and the Block/goose data layout used by newer Goose builds.

redaction_notes: Reads the provider SQLite database read-only; imported message text, tool output previews, working directories, file paths, model, token/cost metadata, and local source paths remain in the local ctx index.
blockers: Full GA needs continued validation against Goose sessions.db schema drift.

notes: Reads Dexto SQLite kv_store/list_store session data using a read-only connection.
Discovery is explicit-path only because the researched clone did not prove a stable default data directory.

redaction_notes: Reads the provider SQLite database read-only; imported generic message JSON, file paths, parent session metadata, and local source paths remain in the local ctx index.
blockers: No default local Dexto data directory is claimed yet; users must pass an explicit SQLite path.

notes: Reads Lingma chat_record rows from ~/.lingma/vscode/sharedClientCache/cache/db/local.db and the vscode-insiders variant.
Imports chat_prompt as user prompts and summary/error_result as assistant summary/notice content; original assistant answers may be encrypted, transformed, or unavailable.
Qoder CN is the renamed Lingma product line in Alibaba public docs, but ctx does not alias qoder-cn without source-backed proof of the same local DB path and schema.

redaction_notes: Reads the provider SQLite database read-only; imported prompt text, summaries/errors, extra JSON, and local source paths remain in the local ctx index.
Assistant content is summary/error_result only and may be incomplete.
blockers: No qoder-cn provider alias is shipped because source-backed proof for a Qoder CN local DB path/schema was not found.

notes: Reads CodeBuddy JSON history under recursive history/<md5(projectPath)> project directories.
Session index.json lists messages; message bodies are read from messages/*.json and may contain stringified JSON.
Discovery checks ~/.codebuddy, ~/Library/Application Support/CodeBuddyExtension/Data, and LOCALAPPDATA/CodeBuddyExtension.

redaction_notes: Reads provider JSON files read-only; imported message text, model hints, and local source paths remain in the local ctx index.
CodeBuddy context wrapper tags such as project_context and user_info are removed from the searchable preview.
blockers: Schema proof comes from the WayLog reader and sanitized fixtures rather than official CodeBuddy documentation; continue validating against real-world schema drift.

notes: Reads project-local Aider Desk task directories containing context.json and optional settings.json under .aider-desk/tasks/<taskId>.
Default discovery walks cwd ancestors and only reports Aider Desk when the current project has an AIDER_DESK_DIR/tasks or .aider-desk/tasks tree.
Normalizes contextMessages user, assistant, tool-call, and tool-result parts while retaining capped native JSON metadata for attachments and unrecognized fields.

redaction_notes: Reads project-local provider JSON files read-only; imported message text, model hints, local source paths, and cwd metadata remain in the local ctx index.
Image/file parts and unrecognized provider fields are retained only as capped native JSON metadata.
blockers: Importer is based on hotovo/aider-desk commit 01ad9d3ab75998fbc79c6decca5896ba6ef294aa and sanitized fixtures; future schema changes may need adapter updates.
ctx imports task context snapshots and optional task settings, not the application usage database.

notes: Reads OpenClaw session JSONL transcripts under OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR, ~/.openclaw, and verified legacy ~/.clawdbot or ~/.moltbot homes.
This is beta because upstream exposes newer session helpers and warns plugins not to depend on legacy sessions.json shape.

redaction_notes: Imports are local/private and preserve source paths for citations.
blockers: Full GA needs confirmation that the local transcript contract remains stable across newer OpenClaw session APIs.

notes: Reads Hermes Agent SQLite history from HERMES_HOME/state.db or ~/.hermes/state.db using a read-only SQLite connection.
Preserves sessions/messages rows, parent session IDs, model/config metadata, tool call metadata, token fields, and billing fields when present.

redaction_notes: Reads the provider SQLite database read-only; imported text remains in the local ctx index.

notes: Preview importer for a NanoClaw project root containing data/v2.db and data/v2-sessions/*/*/{inbound.db,outbound.db}.
Project roots are discovered from the current working directory and ancestors, but preview sources are not imported by ctx import --all or pre-search refresh.

redaction_notes: Manual preview imports may include IM/chat channel identifiers stored in NanoClaw project databases.
blockers: Automatic refresh is intentionally disabled until more real-world NanoClaw project layout drift is validated.

notes: Preview importer for AstrBot data/data_v4.db conversation context plus available platform_message_history rows.
This is not a full all-channel IM transcript guarantee; connector/plugin histories may live outside the supported tables.

redaction_notes: Manual preview imports may include IM platform IDs, user IDs, sender names, and local chat text.
blockers: Full GA needs stronger upstream guarantees for complete per-platform raw message retention.

notes: Reads Shelley SQLite history from SHELLEY_DB or ~/.config/shelley/shelley.db using a read-only SQLite connection.
Normalizes conversations as sessions and messages as events with stable conversation/sequence/message cursors.
Indexes text from Shelley user/agent/tool JSON, including thinking, tool calls, and tool results when present.

redaction_notes: Reads the provider SQLite database read-only; imported conversation text, tool output, cwd, model, usage, and local source paths remain in the local ctx index.
blockers: Full GA needs ongoing validation against upstream Shelley schema drift.

notes: Reads Continue CLI session JSON files from CONTINUE_GLOBAL_DIR/sessions or ~/.continue/sessions.
Uses sessions.json as optional metadata and imports each session JSON history item as a stable event.
Indexes message content, context item text, tool call names/status, and tool output previews when present.

redaction_notes: Reads provider JSON files read-only; imported message text, tool output previews, cwd, usage, and local source paths remain in the local ctx index.
blockers: Coverage is for Continue CLI sessions/*.json history, not editor webview-only state.

notes: Reads OpenHands filesystem event JSON under <persistence>/<user_id>/v1_conversations/<conversation-id-hex>/*.json.
Discovery checks OH_PERSISTENCE_DIR, legacy FILE_STORE_PATH, and ~/.openhands.
The SQLite metadata database openhands.db is not required for local OSS event import.

redaction_notes: Reads provider JSON files read-only; imported message text, tool output previews, cwd, and local source paths remain in the local ctx index.

notes: Reads Antigravity transcript JSONL mirrors under ~/.gemini/antigravity-cli/brain/*/.system_generated/logs, preferring transcript_full.jsonl when present.
Native source discovery marks Antigravity available only when transcript_full.jsonl or transcript.jsonl exists.
Preserves typed tool call arguments as bounded local JSON previews.
Reads Gemini CLI chat JSONL records under ~/.gemini/tmp/**/chats, including nested subagent chats when present.
Native source discovery marks Gemini available only when chat JSONL files exist under the chats path.
Reads Cursor CLI agent transcript JSONL files under ~/.cursor/projects/*/agent-transcripts/*/*.jsonl.
Native source discovery marks Cursor available only when JSONL files exist under an agent-transcripts path.
Cursor auth stores and ai-tracking code metadata are not imported.
Reads Zed agent threads from $XDG_DATA_HOME/zed/threads/threads.db or ~/.local/share/zed/threads/threads.db using a read-only SQLite connection.
threads.data is zstd-compressed DbThread JSON per zed-industries/zed commit e3b73c6b30cdc09e820823fe44542b89850d4be1.
DbThread messages do not carry per-message timestamps; ctx uses the thread updated_at for imported event timestamps.

blockers: Schema confidence is anchored to zed-industries/zed commit e3b73c6b30cdc09e820823fe44542b89850d4be1 and the current DbThread version; future Zed schema changes may need adapter updates.
Per-message timestamps are not present in DbThread messages, so event timestamps are thread-level updated_at values.

notes: Reads Copilot CLI session event logs named events.jsonl under ~/.copilot/session-state.
Native source discovery marks Copilot CLI available only when events.jsonl exists.
Reads Factory AI Droid session JSONL files under ~/.factory/sessions, including worker session linkage when present.
Reads Qwen Code chat JSONL files under QWEN_RUNTIME_DIR/projects, QWEN_HOME/projects, or ~/.qwen/projects.
Native source discovery marks Qwen Code available only when JSONL files exist under a chats path.
Reads Kimi Code CLI agents/*/wire.jsonl files plus adjacent state.json and session_index.jsonl metadata under KIMI_CODE_HOME or ~/.kimi-code.
Native source discovery marks Kimi Code CLI available only when agent wire.jsonl files exist.
Reads Autohand Code sessions under AUTOHAND_HOME/sessions or ~/.autohand/sessions when each session directory contains metadata.json plus conversation.jsonl.
Native source discovery marks Autohand Code available only when a conversation.jsonl file has sibling metadata.json.

blockers: Imports Autohand's current message JSONL fields; token/cost telemetry and any future non-message sidecar files are not claimed.

notes: Reads iFlow CLI session JSONL transcripts under IFLOW_HOME/projects or ~/.iflow/projects.
Native source discovery marks iFlow CLI available only when session-*.jsonl files exist under a projects tree; supplemental tmp checkpoints are not imported.

blockers: Importer is based on the current minified iFlow CLI bundle and sanitized JSONL fixtures; future schema changes may need adapter updates.
Supplemental ~/.iflow/tmp checkpoints are intentionally skipped because projects/session-*.jsonl is the canonical resumable history path.

notes: Reads ForgeCode conversation snapshots from FORGE_CONFIG/.forge.db, legacy ~/forge/.forge.db, or ~/.forge/.forge.db when the SQLite conversations table exists.
Normalizes context JSON messages, tool calls, tool results, image placeholders, usage metadata, and metrics file touches while retaining capped raw context and metrics JSON.

blockers: ForgeCode stores the conversation as a mutable context JSON snapshot, so message cursors use the message array index rather than upstream stable message ids.
The importer recognizes the DTO fields present in Forge repository migrations and conversation records, but future unrecognized DTO fields are retained as capped raw metadata until explicitly mapped.

notes: Reads Mistral Vibe session directories containing meta.json and messages.jsonl under VIBE_HOME/logs/session, ~/.vibe/logs/session, or an explicit session/log root.
Normalizes user, assistant, system, tool-call, and tool-output messages from Vibe JSONL while retaining capped metadata from meta.json and individual message rows.

blockers: Importer is based on mistralai/mistral-vibe commit 474a0e4055b210a60c39ed0c89458d904b7f6a7b and sanitized JSONL fixtures; future schema changes may need adapter updates.
The public Vibe session log carries message timestamps inconsistently, so ctx falls back to deterministic import/session timestamps when a row does not expose one.

notes: Reads Mux session directories containing chat.jsonl and optional partial.json under MUX_ROOT/sessions, ~/.mux/sessions, or an explicit sessions/session path.
Normalizes MuxMessage parts for user/assistant/system messages, dynamic-tool calls and outputs, staged partial messages, token/model metadata, and archived subagent transcripts.

blockers: Importer is based on coder/mux tag v0.27.0 and sanitized chat/partial/subagent fixtures; future schema changes may need adapter updates.
The checked-in fixture is sanitized because producing a real Mux transcript requires model/auth setup.

notes: Reads Reasonix session JSONL files under ~/.reasonix/sessions or an explicit sessions tree/transcript file.
Merges adjacent .events.jsonl, .meta.json, .pending.json, and .plan.json sidecars when present.

redaction_notes: Raw provider paths are retained only as local source metadata for citations.
Usage and cost fields are numeric metadata; raw sidecar/session JSON is retained only in capped local previews.
blockers: Importer is based on esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix tag v0.53.2 and sanitized JSONL fixtures; future schema changes may need adapter updates.
Base session ChatMessage rows do not include timestamps, so ctx uses event/transcript timestamps when available and otherwise falls back to the import timestamp.

notes: Reads Kode project JSONL transcripts under KODE_CONFIG_DIR/projects, CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR/projects, ~/.kode/projects, or an explicit projects tree.

Imports primary <sessionId>.jsonl rows plus agent-<id>.jsonl sidechains as child sessions, normalizing user/assistant messages, summaries, titles, tags, snapshots, tool calls, tool output, and touched-file paths.

blockers: Importer is based on @shareai-lab/kode 2.2.1 source evidence and sanitized fixtures; future package schema changes may need adapter updates.
agent-<id>.jsonl sidechain parentage is inferred from the file name plus row sessionId because Kode sidechain rows retain the parent sessionId.

notes: Reads Neovate project session JSONL transcripts under ~/.neovate/projects or an explicit projects tree.
Imports type:"message" rows plus snapshot rows while intentionally excluding project requests/ and file-history/ JSONL sidecars from session import.

blockers: Importer is based on @neovate/code 0.28.5 type declarations and bundled storage-path code plus sanitized fixtures; future package schema changes may need adapter updates.
Request logs under requests/ and file-history snapshots are sidecars, not primary session transcripts, and are not imported as sessions.

notes: Reads Terramind/Nucleus agents.db SQLite history from $XDG_CONFIG_HOME/Nucleus/data/agents.db, ~/.config/Nucleus/data/agents.db, macOS ~/Library/Application Support/Nucleus/data/agents.db, Windows %APPDATA%/Nucleus/data/agents.db, or an explicit agents.db path.
Normalizes projects, chats, sub_chats.messages JSON, and split tool_outputs rows from the terramind@0.2.91 package schema while opening source databases read-only.

blockers: Source proof comes from the published terramind@0.2.91 npm package and its bundled Drizzle schema/migrations; a no-auth npx probe did not finish in a temporary home, so the fixture is source-backed rather than live-generated.
The schema exposes execution_env and parent_sub_chat_id, but no stable parent edge contract for ctx session_edges has been validated yet.

notes: Reads Cline task directories containing api_conversation_history.json, ui_messages.json, context_history.json, or task_metadata.json.
Discovery covers CLINE_DATA_DIR, CLINE_DIR/data, CLINE_SESSION_DATA_DIR sibling data roots, CLINE_DB_DATA_DIR sibling data roots, ~/.cline/data, and common VS Code globalStorage folders.

redaction_notes: Reads local task JSON files read-only; imported text remains in the local ctx index.
Raw provider paths are retained only as local source metadata for citations.
blockers: VS Code private extension state databases are not parsed; file-backed task directories are required.

notes: Reads Roo Code task directories containing api_conversation_history.json, ui_messages.json, history_item.json, _index.json, or claude_messages.json.

Discovery covers roo-cline.customStoragePath from VS Code settings, common VS Code globalStorage folders for RooVeterinaryInc.roo-cline, ROO_CODE_DATA_DIR, ROO_DATA_DIR, ROO_CLINE_DATA_DIR, and explicit paths.

redaction_notes: Reads local task JSON files read-only; imported text remains in the local ctx index.
Raw provider paths are retained only as local source metadata for citations.
blockers: VS Code private extension state databases are not parsed; file-backed task directories are required.
